title: hieracium murorum subsp. ellipticans
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. ellipticus, also known as a plant species within the Hawkweed genus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium murorum subsp. ellipticus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
